title: Purchasing Overview
description: Supplier spend, order workload and receiving risk at a glance — net-of-returns spend trend with month-on-month KPI cards, spend by item group, top suppliers, a purchase-order status mix and an overdue-POs action list. Built from submitted Purchase Invoices and Purchase Orders. Amounts are in base currency; spend is net of returns (debit notes ride along as negative rows). Order count and average order value are measured on Purchase Orders by transaction date.
